CustomField.description: SOQL Rows usage as percentage of transaction total. Shows warning (30%) and danger (50%) thresholds to identify resource-heavy work items.
CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(LimitsSoqlRowsConsumed__c) || ISBLANK(AuditTransaction__r.LimitsSoqlRowsConsumed__c) || AuditTransaction__r.LimitsSoqlRowsConsumed__c = 0, "N/A", IF(LimitsSoqlRowsConsumed__c / AuditTransaction__r.LimitsSoqlRowsConsumed__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.SoqlRows.WorkItemRedPercent__c / 100, "⛔", IF(LimitsSoqlRowsConsumed__c / AuditTransaction__r.LimitsSoqlRowsConsumed__c >= $CustomMetadata.UoWLimitsThreshold__mdt.SoqlRows.WorkItemAmberPercent__c / 100, "⚠️", "✅") ) & " " & TEXT(ROUND(LimitsSoqlRowsConsumed__c / AuditTransaction__r.LimitsSoqlRowsConsumed__c * 100, 1)) & "% of txn (" & TEXT(LimitsSoqlRowsConsumed__c) & " / " & TEXT(AuditTransaction__r.LimitsSoqlRowsConsumed__c) & ")" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: SOQL Rows usage as percentage of transaction total. Shows warning (30%) and danger (50%) thresholds to identify resource-heavy work items.
CustomField.label: SOQL Rows
